creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery
Date: Thu Aug 22 02:37:47 2013
New Revision: 325174
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/325174

Log:
  - Fix build
  - Update to 1.6.0
  
  PR:		ports/177758
  Submitted by:	Petr Rehor <prehor@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/security/amavisd-milter/Makefile
  head/security/amavisd-milter/distinfo

Modified: head/security/amavisd-milter/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/security/amavisd-milter/Makefile	Wed Aug 21 23:26:34 2013	(r325173)
+++ head/security/amavisd-milter/Makefile	Thu Aug 22 02:37:47 2013	(r325174)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	amavisd-milter
-PORTVERSION=	1.5.0
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	1.6.0
 CATEGORIES=	security mail
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
 
@@ -12,8 +11,6 @@ COMMENT=	Milter for amavisd-new
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	amavisd:${PORTSDIR}/security/amavisd-new
 
-BROKEN=	Does not build
-
 ##
 # Use the following quirks to choose which sendmail to use (ports or system):
 #
